corporate.description: We develop smart applications to organize, manage, and simplify everyday life for people and businesses.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Solutions built to solve real problems
products.coming_soon_desc: New products are being developed. Stay tuned for the latest news.

tracka.name: Tracka
tracka.desc: Smart personal and business inventory management. Catalog, organize, and locate your belongings with AI.

hero.subtitle: Organize everything that matters. Catalog, locate, and manage your belongings with artificial intelligence.

search.title: Smart Search
search.desc: Find any item instantly with advanced filters.

moving.title: Moving Management
moving.desc: Plan moves with visual selection and status control.

multi_device.title: Multi-device
multi_device.desc: Access from any device. PWA with offline support.

security.title: Total Security
security.desc: Encrypted data in compliance with LGPD.

tech.title: Modern Stack
tech.desc: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Turso, Vercel Edge.

user_focus.title: User Focus
user_focus.desc: Intuitive interface inspired by Netflix with premium design.

innovation.title: AI Powered
innovation.desc: Google Cloud Vision for automatic item recognition.

pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the ideal plan for your needs.
pricing.trial: ✨ 15-day free trial with all features on sign up!

free.name: Free
free.desc: For personal use and small organizations.
free.features: 50 Items,50 Vision AI 🤖,1 House,5 Rooms/house,5 Furniture/room,1 Photos/item,0 Collaborators/house

plus.name: Plus
plus.desc: For those who need more space and resources.
plus.features: 200 Items,200 Vision AI 🤖,3 Houses,15 Rooms/house,15 Furniture/room,1 Photos/item,2 Collaborators/house,Usage history,Ranking (most used),Import (Excel),Data export,Consolidation/Moving

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For those who need the most out of Tracka.
pro.features: 2000 Items,2000 Vision AI 🤖,10 Houses,50 Rooms/house,50 Furniture/room,1 Photos/item,10 Collaborators/house,Usage history,Ranking (most used),Import (Excel),Data export,Consolidation/Moving

items.question: Is Tracka free?
items.answer: Yes! The Free plan is free forever.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes, we use encryption and follow LGPD.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! Tracka is a PWA that works on any device.

cta.title: Ready to organize your life?
cta.subtitle: Start for free and discover how Tracka can simplify your day.
